# REGIME READ — 2026-07-16

## Changes Since Previous Read
- **Stage: 3 → 3 (unchanged) — but for the first time in the sequence the direction of travel is confirmed constructive by the exact datapoint that was missing. The overdue neutralizer finally printed, and it printed BULLISH.**
- **THE DOMINANT FACT: VXN finally updated — and it RETRACED.** The prior read's single unresolved item, named across two reads as *"the next VXN print is the neutralizer,"* has now landed: **VXN 25.65 (Jul 15), −2.40%, down from the frozen 27.30 spike.** The +9.68% Jul-13 spike is now confirmed as the one-session artifact the prior read suspected — exactly as the Jul-10 sub-25 print had been. **The DOWNTURN vol leg (VXN ≥ 25) is now only marginally satisfied at 25.65 (0.65 pts above threshold) and pointing down, not up.**
- **The equity tape flipped from all-down to broadly GREEN.** The prior read's governing stress signal was the Jul-13 all-five-down session. Jul 15 reversed it: **SPX +0.38%, Nasdaq Comp +0.62%, DJI +0.29%, Russell +0.39% — four of five green, small-caps participating.** Only **NDX −0.28%** dipped, dragged by a semiconductor sell-off (Micron −8%, Lam −3%, AMD −3%), while Apple hit a record high (China GenAI approval) and Alphabet/Amazon/Microsoft rose ~3% ([Yahoo Finance, Jul 15, 2026](https://finance.yahoo.com/markets/live/stock-market-today-wednesday-july-15-dow-sp-nasdaq-091813320.html)).
- **A softer-than-expected wholesale inflation (PPI) print** drove the macro relief: **10Y fell to 4.545 (−0.87%), breaking the three-consecutive-rise streak** that anchored the prior read's macro −1.
- **Brent's stall is now confirmed dead.** 85.16, **+0.25%** (Jul 16) — a fourth flat session, no fourth impulse. Gold flat-to-soft (4,036.80, −0.18%). **The oil↑+gold↑+dollar↓ risk-hedge complex that forced the geopolitical downgrade two reads ago is fully dissolved.**
- **Total score: −2 → +2 (delta +4).** The largest swing of the sequence, and it is earned: the neutralizer resolved bullish, the equity tape turned green, PPI came in soft, yields relieved, and the oil-hedge signal died — four independent improvements landing at once. Dealer, Macro, Breadth and Cross-asset each lifted one notch; the swing is real, not an arithmetic correction.
- **Triggers from previous read:**
  - **Neutralizer — a fresh VXN close:** **FIRED, BULLISH.** 25.65 (Jul 15, −2.40%). The spike retraced; DOWNTURN vol leg all but disarmed.
  - **Bullish — VXN below 25 for 2 sessions:** **HALF-FIRED.** 25.65 is one session, still 0.65 pts above 25 — one more sub-25 close completes it.
  - **Bullish — VIX below 15 for 2 sessions:** **NOT FIRED.** VIX ticked **up** +2.74% to 16.10 (Jul 16) — 1.10 pts above 15. The lone gauge that did not improve.
  - **Bullish — Nasdaq Comp buffer above −4%:** **FIRED.** −3.4% (was −4.0%, at the line last read).
  - **Bullish — DJI buffer held:** **HOLDS**, improved to −1.2% (was −1.5%).
  - **Bearish — VIX above 18:** **NOT FIRED**, further away (16.10, +1.90 pts of room).
  - **Bearish — VXN toward 30:** **CLEARED** — moved the opposite way to 25.65.
  - **Bearish — Brent fourth impulse / reclaim 86:** **NOT FIRED** — flat +0.25%, still below 86, impulse dead.
  - **Bearish — Nasdaq Comp breaks −5%:** **CLEARED** — buffer widened to −3.4%.
  - **Bearish — HY OAS through 300 bp:** **STILL NOT REFRESHED. Week 10.** The one bearish trigger that remains purely unmeasured.
- **Notable lens flips: four lenses lifted one notch.** Dealer 0 → **+1** (VXN neutralizer resolved bullish, VIX sub-18); Macro −1 → **0** (soft PPI + yield relief, capped by unmeasured credit); Breadth −1 → **0** (broad-green session, capped by unmeasured internals); Cross-asset −1 → **0** (risk-hedge complex dissolved). Sentiment held **0** (one green session + stale surveys — take-the-lower); Geopolitical held **+1**; Positioning held **0**.

## Broad Market Snapshot
| Item | Level | % vs 52W High | Day Change | As of |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| SPX | 7,572.40 | −0.6% | +0.38% | 2026-07-15 (yfinance) |
| Nasdaq Composite | 26,269.23 | −3.4% | +0.62% | 2026-07-15 (nasdaq) |
| NDX | 29,502.60 | −4.1% | −0.28% (semis drag) | 2026-07-15 (nasdaq) |
| DJI | 52,658.64 | −1.2% | +0.29% | 2026-07-15 (yfinance) |
| Russell 2000 | 2,976.26 | −2.3% | +0.39% | 2026-07-15 (yfinance) |
| VIX | 16.10 | −54.4% | +2.74% — ticks up but still 1.90 pts BELOW 18; the only gauge not improving | 2026-07-16 (yfinance) |
| VXN | **25.65** | −25.4% | **−2.40% — NEUTRALIZER FIRED: retraced from 27.30; DOWNTURN vol leg all but disarmed** | 2026-07-15 (yfinance) |
| 10Y yield | 4.545 | −3.0% | −0.87% — three-rise streak BROKEN on soft PPI | 2026-07-15 (yfinance) |

> **Snapshot mix (still a ~1-session spread, but the story reversed):** Equities + **VXN** + 10Y = **Jul 15 close**; VIX + DXY + Brent + Gold = **Jul 16 intraday.** This read the spread cuts the *right* way: the confirming Nasdaq/equity gauges (VXN retrace, green tape) are the fresh-enough Jul-15 prints, and the sole holdout is the Jul-16 VIX up-tick — a minor pullback from a low base.
>
> **Headline #1 — the neutralizer resolved, and in the bull's favour.** For two reads the whole picture hung on whether VXN's +9.68% spike was a genuine regime shift or an artifact. It was an artifact: VXN retraced to 25.65. The Nasdaq-specific fear that the prior read warned had "not been re-measured" has now been re-measured, and it fell.
>
> **Headline #2 — the relief has finally reached the right index.** The prior read's central complaint was that calm was in VIX (broad) while VXN (Nasdaq) stayed frozen. That gap closed: VXN itself came down, and the Nasdaq Comp buffer widened to −3.4%. For a 3×-Nasdaq instrument, the improvement is now where the exposure is.
>
> **Headline #3 — soft PPI did the heavy lifting.** A softer-than-expected wholesale inflation print pulled the 10Y down to 4.545 and broke the yields-up-into-weakness discomfort that defined the last three reads. Disinflation, not just positioning, is behind the turn.
>
> **Headline #4 — the one blemish is under the hood: semis.** NDX was the lone red index because chipmakers sold off hard (Micron −8%) even as the megacaps and small-caps rose. Leadership is narrow (megacap-up / semis-down) — the reason this is a Stage-2-*character* tape, not a clean broad advance.

## Regime Stage Tracker
- **Current Stage: 3 — Neutral/choppy, now decisively resolving upward.** The prior read sat on the Stage-3/4 boundary with three near-fired bearish triggers; this read has cleared or reversed every one of them and flipped four lenses up a notch. Stage 3 is held only because the two pre-registered Stage-2 confirmations are not *both* complete: VXN needs a second sub-25 close (one so far) and VIX is 1.10 pts above the sub-15 leg. **The character is Stage 2; the confirmation triggers are one session short.**
- **Stage Anchor:** Jul 15, 2026 — the VXN retrace (27.30 → 25.65) plus the broad-green PPI-relief session; this supersedes the Jul-13 spike as the governing structural event.
- **Position:** Confirmed relief, one session into a potential Stage-2 grind. **Stage 2 recovery (55%):** a second VXN sub-25 close + VIX holding/reclaiming sub-15 while megacap leadership persists. **Stage 3 sustain (30%):** VXN chops in the 25–27 band, VIX holds 16–18, semis keep the Nasdaq range-bound. **Stage 4 re-entry (10%):** VXN re-spikes toward 27+, or a semiconductor-led NDX break, or an oil re-ignition. **Stage 5 tail (5%):** named geopolitical escalation + HY OAS confirmed wide (unmeasured 10 weeks).
- **Confidence: Medium (bordering High).** Why higher than last read: the neutralizer resolved, the equity tape confirmed, PPI + yields corroborate, and the oil-hedge stress died — four independent, mutually-reinforcing improvements. **Not High because:** (1) the Stage-2 confirmation is one session short (VXN sub-25 for only 1 of 2, VIX still >15); (2) **HY OAS unmeasured 10 weeks** — the contained-rotation-vs-broad-risk-off discriminator is still blind; (3) breadth *internals* (A/D, McClellan, %>50DMA) still unretrievable — the green read is index-level only; (4) leadership is narrow (semis selling off under a megacap-led tape); (5) TQQQ's true 50DMA position is broker-unconfirmed, though a fresh ~$75 print now exists (below).
- **Bullish trigger (→ Stage 2):** a **second VXN close below 25** AND **VIX reclaiming sub-15** (1.10 pts away) AND **NDX joining the broad tape green** (semis stabilizing) AND **broker-confirmed TQQQ 50DMA reclaim** (spot ~1.8% below).
- **Bearish trigger (→ Stage 4):** **VXN re-closes back above 27** OR **VIX back above 18** OR **a semiconductor-led NDX break to −5% vs 52W high** OR **Brent posts a genuine fourth impulse / reclaims 86** OR **a named geopolitical event** OR **HY OAS confirmed through 300 bp (unmeasured 10 weeks)**.

## Regime Verdict
US risk environment **holds Stage 3 but resolves decisively upward — Medium confidence, bordering High.** The two-read cliffhanger is over: **VXN finally printed and retraced to 25.65 (−2.40%), confirming the +9.68% spike was a one-session artifact and all but disarming the DOWNTURN vol leg.** The equity tape flipped from all-down to broadly green (SPX/Comp/DJI/Russell all up; only NDX −0.28% on a semiconductor sell-off), a **softer-than-expected PPI** pulled the 10Y down to 4.545 and broke the three-session yield-rise, and **Brent's stall is now confirmed dead (four flat sessions) with gold's risk-hedge confirmation withdrawn.** Four lenses lift a notch and the total swings −2 → **+2**. It stays *Stage 3* rather than Stage 2 only because the pre-registered confirmations are one session short — VXN needs a second sub-25 close and VIX (16.10) is still 1.10 pts above the sub-15 leg — and because the advance is megacap-narrow with semis lagging, credit unmeasured for a tenth week, and breadth internals still blind. **The improvement is real, corroborated across four independent gauges, and — for once — measured on the Nasdaq-specific data that actually prices TQQQ.**

|---|---|---|---|
| 1. Positioning | **0** | Neutral (held) | No F&G, NAAIM, COT, AAII, margin-debt, or ETF-flow data retrievable. **Data gap Week 10.** Scored neutral per hard rules |
| 2. Dealer / Options Flow | **+1** | Bullish (up from 0) | **VXN 25.65 Jul 15, −2.40% — the neutralizer FIRED bullish; the 27.30 spike retraced, DOWNTURN vol leg all but disarmed, VXN now heading toward the sub-25 bullish leg (0.65 pts away).** VIX 16.10 Jul 16, +2.74% but still 1.90 pts below 18 and healthy. Upgraded to +1: the hard datapoint that gated two reads resolved constructively. Held short of +2 by the one-session VIX up-tick (sub-15 leg 1.10 pts away) and no term-structure/SKEW/VVIX/put-call data |
| 3. Macro / Liquidity | **0** | Neutral (up from −1) | **Softer-than-expected PPI (wholesale inflation) Jul 15 → 10Y 4.545, −0.87%, breaking the three-consecutive-rise streak.** DXY 100.57, +0.07% (flat). 2s10s est. ~+18 bp (2Y not supplied). Upgraded from −1: disinflation + yield relief is genuine. Held at 0 not +1 by take-the-lower — **HY OAS / IG / MOVE unmeasured, Week 10** — the credit discriminator is still missing |

Breadth / Internals | **0** | Neutral (up from −1) | **Jul-15 session broadly green: SPX +0.38%, Comp +0.62%, DJI +0.29%, Russell +0.39% — small-caps participating; only NDX −0.28% on semis.** Buffers widened: Comp −3.4% (was −4.0%), NDX −4.1%. DXY +0.07%. **The oil↑+gold↑+dollar↓ risk-hedge complex that forced the prior geopolitical downgrade is fully dissolved.** Upgraded from −1: the risk-*off* signal cleared. HY/IG, Copper/Gold, BTC, sector ratios not retrieved |

Sentiment | **0** | Neutral (held) | **Constructive tape: Apple record high (China GenAI approval), Alphabet/Amazon/Microsoft ~+3%, broad-green session, VIX low.** But offset by a hard **semiconductor sell-off (Micron −8%, Lam/AMD −3%)** and **F&G stale since Jun 17 — Week 10.** Held 0 per take-the-lower: one green session + narrow (megacap-only) leadership + no survey data is insufficient to score positive; no capitulation signature to score negative |

Geopolitical | **+1** | Bullish, weakly (held) | Jun 19 MOU formally intact; no named escalation/walk-back retrievable. **Brent's impulse is now confirmed dead (four flat sessions) and gold's confirmation gone — the oil pressure that forced the earlier +2→+1 downgrade has fully cleared.** Held +1 rather than restored to +2: the *reason* for the downgrade is gone, but restoring +2 needs active de-escalation news, not merely the absence of escalation. Any named Iran/Russia/Taiwan event takes this to 0 or below immediately |
| **TOTAL** | **+2** | — | Bullish: dealer +1, geopolitical +1 = **+2**. Bearish: none. Neutral: positioning, macro, breadth, cross-asset, sentiment = 0. **Net +2, up from the prior read's true −2 (delta +4).** The swing is earned by four independent improvements landing together — the VXN neutralizer resolving bullish, the green PPI-relief tape, the yield break, and the dead oil-hedge. **A second VXN sub-25 close + VIX sub-15 would lift Dealer to +2 and likely carry the total to +3 / Stage 2; a VXN re-spike above 27 or a semis-led NDX break drops it back toward 0.** |

## Diverging Signals
- **THE ONE REMAINING TENSION — megacap-narrow leadership vs a semiconductor sell-off.** The broad tape was green and small-caps participated, but NDX alone closed red because chipmakers were hit hard (Micron −8%). **For a 3×-Nasdaq instrument this is the signal that matters most:** the index TQQQ is levered to lagged the advance on a sector-specific sell-off. The relief is real but the Nasdaq's own leadership is the narrowest part of it.
- **VIX ticked up while everything else relieved.** VIX +2.74% to 16.10 is the lone non-confirming gauge — but it is a minor pullback from a low base (still 1.90 pts below 18), against a VXN that *fell* 2.40%. The disciplined read: this is noise around a low level, not a warning, but it does keep the sub-15 Stage-2 leg unfired for now.
- **The macro relief is real but credit still can't confirm its quality.** Soft PPI + a yield break is unambiguously supportive — but **HY OAS is unmeasured for a tenth week**, so whether this is a healthy disinflation-led risk-on or a rotation masking spread stress remains unanswerable by the one gauge that would settle it. VIX/PPI are not credit gauges.
- **This sequence has over-read single-session VXN moves twice — apply the same discipline now, in reverse.** The Jul-10 sub-25 and Jul-13 +9.68% prints both proved to be single-session artifacts. **A single Jul-15 VXN retrace to 25.65 is one data point; it needs a second sub-25 close to graduate from "artifact reversed" to "confirmed Stage-2 vol regime."** The improvement is scored, but the Stage transition is deliberately withheld until the second print.
- **The oil story deflated exactly as its risk-hedge cousin did — without ever being named.** Three impulses, ~15%, then four flat sessions and a gold reversal, with no retrievable catalyst throughout. Its fade is reassuring for the geopolitical lens, but because the driver was never identified, the fade tells us nothing about what could re-ignite it — hence Cross-asset at 0, not +1.

## TQQQ Read
- **Momentum:** RSI(14) **~45.6 — neutral, mid-range** after a ~+4% up day (one source shows a faster/shorter RSI near 69; the 14-day read is neutral). Not oversold, not overbought — no mean-reversion tailwind and no reversal warning. The recovery broke the down-day estimate; the instrument is stabilizing off its lows.
- **Market structure:** **SIDEWAYS held.** Spot ~$75.02 is **−14.8% from the 4-wk high** (DOWNTURN needs −20%) and **+10.2% above the 4-wk low.** DOWNTURN's vol leg (VXN ≥ 25) is now only marginally satisfied at 25.65 and falling — **one more sub-25 VXN close disarms it entirely.** Both DOWNTURN legs are therefore weakening. RALLY is ~+17% away and irrelevant. (Caveat: the Jun-3/Jun-10 4-wk extremes are aging out of a strict mid-July lookback; recent range is nearer ~$68–$81.)
- **Trend:** **Spot ~1.8% below the 50DMA ($76.39) — recovering toward it, no longer clearly lost.** The +4% up day narrows the gap the prior read estimated at −2%. 200DMA cushion ~+10.2%. A confirmed 50DMA reclaim is the cleanest instrument-level Stage-2 tell.
- **Volatility & premium environment:** **VXN 25.65 — retraced.** Est. TQQQ IV **~77.0%**, EM **±10.9%** — both eased as the spike unwound. Premium remains elevated (mid-70s IV) but is coming *off*, not building. The structural read: the vol richness that made prior reads cautious is deflating in an orderly way alongside a recovering underlying — a calmer premium backdrop than any read in this sequence. Descriptive only.
- **Put-selling context: CAUTIOUS held — but the most favourable read of the sequence, one confirming session from FAVOURABLE.** Held CAUTIOUS — not yet upgraded to FAVOURABLE — because: (1) the Stage-2 confirmation is one session short (VXN sub-25 for 1 of 2; VIX 16.10 still above the sub-15 leg); (2) **spot still ~1.8% below the 50DMA** — the reclaim is unconfirmed; (3) the Nasdaq's own leadership was the narrowest part of the tape (semis −8% while megacaps set records); (4) **HY OAS unmeasured 10 weeks** — credit still blind; (5) the one-sigma path still reaches the ~$67 200DMA/4-wk-low floor. What genuinely improved and is now measured on the right data: **VXN retraced (neutralizer resolved bullish), the Nasdaq-Comp buffer widened, TQQQ recovered ~+4% toward its 50DMA, PPI came in soft, yields relieved, and the oil-hedge stress died.** **Net: CAUTIOUS — decisively less threatening than any prior read in the sequence, its improvement finally confirmed on the Nasdaq-specific data, but withheld from FAVOURABLE pending a second VXN sub-25 close, a VIX sub-15 reclaim, and a confirmed TQQQ 50DMA reclaim. Context only — no strikes, sizes, expiries, or trade calls.**

## Forward Levels & Triggers
- **Bullish trigger (→ Stage 2):** a **second VXN close below 25** AND **VIX reclaiming sub-15** (1.10 pts away) AND **NDX joining the broad tape green** (semis stabilizing) AND **broker-confirmed TQQQ 50DMA reclaim** (~1.8% above spot).
- **Bearish trigger (→ Stage 4):** **VXN re-closes above 27** OR **VIX back above 18** OR **a semiconductor-led NDX break to −5% vs 52W high** OR **Brent reclaims 86 / posts a real fourth impulse** OR **a named geopolitical event** OR **HY OAS confirmed through 300 bp (unmeasured 10 weeks)**.
- **Neutralizer:** With the VXN neutralizer now resolved bullish, the new pivot is **the second VXN print + the VIX sub-15 leg.** A second sub-25 VXN close with VIX reclaiming 15 confirms Stage 2 and would flip the put-selling context to FAVOURABLE. Conversely, a VXN re-spike above 27 or a semis-led NDX break would re-arm the DOWNTURN vol leg and pull the read back to the boundary. Separately, a Brent reclaim of 86 with gold re-confirming would re-ignite the risk-hedge complex.

## This Period's Catalysts
- **Jul 15, 2026 (Wed):** **Beige Book 4:15 pm ET** ([Fed calendar](https://www.federalreserve.gov/newsevents/2026-july.htm)) — secondary, not a decision event.
- **~Jul 20–21, 2026:** **Netflix** and the first wave of tech earnings begin at the far edge of the window; no confirmed QQQ-heavyweight report inside the next 5 sessions.
- **Jul 28–29, 2026:** **FOMC decision** (press conference Jul 29, 2:00 pm ET) — the next critical decision event, ~8 trading sessions out, OUTSIDE the current window.
- **Jul 30, 2026:** **Q2 GDP Advance** 8:30 am ET.
- **Week of Jul 27–31:** Mega-cap (Mag-7) earnings cluster — the next concentration-risk catalyst for NDX/TQQQ.
- **Ongoing, unscheduled:** whether VXN posts a second sub-25 close; whether the semiconductor sell-off is a one-day rotation or the start of Nasdaq leadership erosion; whether Brent's stall holds.

## Expiry-Window Flag
- **Catalysts inside the next 5 trading days (Jul 16, 17, 20, 21, 22):** **none critical.** June CPI already released (Jul 14); **FOMC is Jul 28–29 — OUTSIDE the window.** Netflix/first-wave tech earnings begin ~Jul 20 at the far edge with no QQQ-heavyweight report confirmed inside the window.
- **Window: CLEAN-WINDOW** — no scheduled FOMC decision, CPI, NFP, or major central-bank decision inside the next 5 sessions. Residual risk is headline/flow (a semis-led NDX wobble, an oil re-ignition, a VXN re-spike, an early tech-earnings surprise), not calendar risk.

## Structural Calendar Flag (deterministic — always report)
- **Quad-witching:** Last **Jun 19, 2026** (digested). Next **Sep 18, 2026** (~44 trading days out). **Outside the 2-session window.**
- **Quarter-end rebalance:** Last **Jun 30, 2026** (digested). Next **Sep 30, 2026** (~52 trading days out). **Outside the 2-session window.**
- **Net:** No structural calendar items inside the 2-session window. Intraday volume and pinning behavior are **not** structurally elevated by calendar mechanics today. The VXN retrace, green tape, and yield break are genuine directional signals, not expiry/rebalancing artifacts. Descriptive only — no trade calls.

> **Hard-rules compliance notes:**
> - Analysis only. No structures, strikes, expiries, or sizing anywhere in this document.
> - **Jul 16 snapshot mix (~1-session spread):** equities + **VXN** + 10Y = **Jul 15 close**; VIX + DXY + Brent + Gold = **Jul 16 intraday.** All index/vol/yield/commodity levels used **verbatim** from the supplied LIVE MARKET SNAPSHOT; no index levels were web-searched.
